project_type: Vanilla JS single-page app with Firebase/Firestore, deployed on Netlify
build_system: No build step - direct browser JS. ESLint + Prettier for validation. npm run validate (lint + format:check).
test_framework: No automated tests. Validation via ESLint only.
verification_instructions: 1. Run 'npm run validate' to check lint/format. 2. Verify the new file is under 100KB. 3. Check that all global functions are accessible from the routes object in core.js.
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network - cannot install npm packages from registry. Use pre-installed eslint/prettier on the system (Node 22 with eslint/prettier available globally). All code is vanilla JS with no transpilation.
contribution_requirements: Single quotes, semicolons required, comma-dangle es5, no-unused-vars warn. Files must stay under 100KB. All functions are global. UI in Indonesian.

key_patterns.file_structure: Each module in its own file: modules-{name}.js. Scripts loaded in index.html with ?v=6.0 cache-busting.
key_patterns.routing: navigateTo(page) calls a function from the routes object in core.js. Admin and portal routes coexist.
key_patterns.navigation: buildNavItems() in core.js constructs sidebar. navGroup(title, [[page,icon,label],...]) creates collapsible groups.
key_patterns.data_access: Firestore via db.collection('hrd_xxx'). No composite indexes - use .get() then filter client-side.
key_patterns.ui_patterns: Cards, tables, tabs, modals, badges. Helper functions: escHtml, formatDate, formatCurrency, toast, openModal, closeModalDirect, generateId.
key_patterns.portal_pattern: Portal pages for staff/leader: renderPortalXxx() functions. Access via portal-xxx route.
key_patterns.form_pattern: modalXxx() opens form via openModal(html). simpanXxx() saves to Firestore.
key_patterns.tab_pattern: div.tabs > div.tab (onclick switch), content rendered below
key_patterns.notification_pattern: sendNotification(targetUser, title, message, link) to notify users

relevant_files: modules-karyawan.js - karyawan data patterns, renderKaryawan, renderKandidat, pipeline
modules-perjalanan-dinas.js - tab-based module pattern with portal variant
directory_structure: Root-level JS files. No subdirectories for code. .agents/tasks/ for task state. docs/ for history.
